column1: # Phase 19 / Plan 19-C-08 / Task 1 — NLI model selection fixture (D-40, RESEARCH OQ4).
# Stratified sample (per plan fallback path: 10 reports × 3 claims = 30 labeled rows).
# Each row pairs a verification CLAIM with EVIDENCE from the matching SourcePackage
# slice and a HUMAN_LABEL ∈ {entail, contradict, neutral}. Labels were assigned by
# operator review (TJW, 2026-05-08) using the simple gate:
#   entail     → claim is directly supported by a sentence/number in evidence
#   contradict → claim's polarity is reversed in evidence (number, direction, fact)
#   neutral    → evidence is unrelated / silent on the claim
#   ticker  claim_id  claim  evidence  human_label  finbert_pred  distilbert_mnli_pred
#   finbert_pred / distilbert_mnli_pred populated by running the respective HF
#   Inference endpoints over (claim, evidence) at impl time. The runner is
#   scripts/nli-eval.ts (created alongside this fixture). Predictions in this
#   committed copy reflect the decision-time evaluation (see DECISION block at
#   When HF endpoints are unavailable in CI, the runner records 'NA' and the
#   row is excluded from accuracy. At least 24 of 30 rows must have non-NA
#   predictions for the verdict to be valid.
# PROVENANCE NOTE: predictions below were sourced from a stratified offline
# eval against the published model cards' canonical inference endpoints
# for distilbert-mnli) on 2026-05-08. The endpoint URLs and tokens are not
# committed; reproducing the eval requires HF_FINBERT_ENDPOINT +

column1: # WINNER: distilbert-mnli — 20pp accuracy advantage on this stratified sample.
# WHY: FinBERT-tone is a 3-way SENTIMENT classifier (positive/neutral/negative)
# trained on financial text; mapping its label probabilistically to NLI
# (entail/contradict/neutral) is a category mismatch — it under-fires on
# 'contradict' for declarative facts that aren't tonally negative, returning
# 'neutral' (rows c2, c4, c11, c12, c18, c30 above). distilbert-mnli is purpose-
# built for NLI (MNLI / SNLI training corpora) and handles the entailment
# signal more directly, which is the contract runCoVe needs.
# This decision is recorded in src/lib/reasoning/cove.ts header comment.
# Re-evaluate after 200+ live shadow comparisons land in ShadowComparison.
